One bounded Compass contract only
no second deep lane

span.p:
No raw-packet prompting
no per-scope provider fanout
no fuzzy/non-exact replay
no synthetic fallback narration

Targets
hot daemon refresh < 50ms median
cold shell-safe refresh < 1s median
